autoencoder_v2.message: No checked-in fingerprinted V2 artifact is available. V2 is the canonical leakage-safe implementation; no result is inferred.

excluded_evidence.reason: Legacy compact autoencoder preprocessing used medians derived from the full timeline, including future observations.

overnight.message: No verifiable checked-in overnight result tree is available. Historical claims retain unknown provenance and are not canonical evidence.

recommendation.reason: The verified weighting ablation selected control, and no provenance-complete checked-in evidence justifies anomaly promotion.

research_status.message: No anomaly truth labels exist. Threshold exceedances are review signals, and known events are explanatory proxies—not anomaly labels.

weekend_v2.message: Weekend-v2 was not run; benchmark and frozen final periods were not reused for tuning.

weekend_v2_preflight.message: The 1.47% development result is non-nested, provenance-limited motivation only. Its 95% bootstrap confidence interval crosses zero.
